words.example: She was completely absorbed in her book.

gloss.en: the act of taking in or soaking up

gloss.en: gathered or built up over time

gloss.en: matters or business to deal with

gloss.en: how old people are; long periods

gloss.en: a set of steps to solve a problem

gloss.en: said to be true but not proven

gloss.en: other choices that can be picked
